name: Monster United
short_description: This is a casual auto-battler game where you need to build your monster legion as you climb the tower! Random levels, rich alliances, and an equipment talent system provide countless possibilities for gameplay strategies, offering both casual relaxation and strategic depth!
detailed_description:
This game combines tower climbing and auto-battler gameplay, making it easier for piece synthesis and upgrades, thus allowing various lineups to form more easily. Players can effortlessly experience the fun of satisfying victories in this game!

The game offers a rich variety of content: over 60 chess pieces with different attribute skills, more than 30 types of enemy units, as well as a massive amount of equipment, alliances, and enhancement talent systems. Despite the diverse lineup strategies, players do not need to memorize all the alliances and other content deliberately. The game difficulty progresses gradually, making it very beginner-friendly, easy to pick up, and allowing players who have never played auto-battler games to enjoy the fun effortlessly.

With a variety of gameplay modes and diverse challenge modes, each mode has its own unique features. The exquisite and detailed game graphics, along with lively and fun animation effects, create a vibrant and entertaining game world for players to immerse themselves in.

supported_languages: English, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Russian, Japanese
